# Music Topologies

Executable `.gg` witnesses for musical probability, rhythm, and harmony models.

Current modules:

- `chordonomicon_probability_tree.gg` projects Chordonomicon-style chord streams
  into a six-function roman numeral transition kernel for human-friendly chord
  progression steering. The runtime surface also models BPM clamping, beat-lock
  quantization, four/eight-bar trading, and section-local song chord sets as a
  finite `SongSection x sectionBar mod 4 x role -> RomanChord` automaton.
- `chordonomicon_probability_tree.test.gg` verifies the row-stochastic tree,
  high-entropy markers, and finite-kernel accounting surface.
